    \('post', '/api/hosts/inspect/excel'\),
]

    print\('OK' if found else 'MISSING', method.upper\(\), path\)
conn.close\(\)

import paramiko, sys

host = "192.168.9.221"
user = "root"
passwd = "Yangys@55"

ssh = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
ssh.connect\(host, username=user, password=passwd, timeout=10\)

def run\(cmd\):
    _, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command\(cmd, timeout=30\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    return out + err

results = {}
results['30080'] = run\("kubectl get svc -A | grep 30080"\)
results['nodeports'] = run\("kubectl get svc -A | grep NodePort"\)
results['pods'] = run\("kubectl get pods -n aiops"\)

ssh.close\(\)

for k, v in results.items\(\):
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f"=== {k} ===\\n".encode\('utf-8'\)\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(v.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"\\n"\)
PYEOF)

import paramiko, sys

host = "192.168.9.221"
user = "root"

Bash("D:/python3-12-9/python.exe" - <<'PYEOF'
import paramiko, sys, json

# Connect to master
master = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
master.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
master.connect\("192.168.9.221", username="root", password="Yangys@55", timeout=10\)

def run_master\(cmd, timeout=60\):
    _, stdout, stderr = master.exec_command\(cmd, timeout=timeout\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    return out + err

# Configure insecure registry on node03 via SSH jump through master
# First check if sshpass is available on master
r = run_master\("which sshpass 2>&1 || echo 'no sshpass'"\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"sshpass: " + r.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\) + b"\\n"\)

# Check if we can SSH to node03 from master without password \(using keys\)
r = run_master\("ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o BatchMode=yes node03 'echo ok' 2>&1"\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"ssh key test: " + r.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\) + b"\\n"\)

# Check current Docker daemon.json on node03 via master
r = run_master\("ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no node03 'cat /etc/docker/daemon.json' 2>&1"\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"node03 daemon.json: " + r.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\) + b"\\n"\)

master.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash("D:/python3-12-9/python.exe" - <<'PYEOF'
import paramiko, sys

master = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
master.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
master.connect\("192.168.9.221", username="root", password="Yangys@55", timeout=10\)

def run\(cmd, timeout=60\):
    _, stdout, stderr = master.exec_command\(cmd, timeout=timeout\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    rc = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status\(\)
    return rc, out + err

# Use heredoc to write script on master
script_content = r"""cat > /tmp/fix_docker.py << 'SCRIPTEOF'
import json, subprocess
path = "/etc/docker/daemon.json"
with open\(path\) as f:
    d = json.load\(f\)
reg = "192.168.9.221:5000"
d.setdefault\("insecure-registries", []\)
if reg not in d["insecure-registries"]:
    d["insecure-registries"].append\(reg\)
    with open\(path, "w"\) as f:
        json.dump\(d, f, indent=2\)
    print\("added " + reg\)
else:
    print\(reg + " already present"\)
subprocess.run\(["systemctl", "reload", "docker"], check=True\)
print\("docker reloaded ok"\)
SCRIPTEOF"""

rc, out = run\(script_content\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"write script: " + out.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\) + f"rc={rc}\\n".encode\(\)\)

# Copy and run on each node
for node in ['node01', 'node02', 'node03']:
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f"=== {node} ===\\n".encode\(\)\)
    rc, out = run\(f"scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no /tmp/fix_docker.py {node}:/tmp/fix_docker.py"\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f"scp rc={rc} {out}\\n".encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
    rc, out = run\(f"ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no {node} python3 /tmp/fix_docker.py"\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(out.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f"rc={rc}\\n".encode\(\)\)

master.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash("D:/python3-12-9/python.exe" - <<'PYEOF'
import paramiko, sys, time

master = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
master.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
master.connect\("192.168.9.221", username="root", password="Yangys@55", timeout=10\)

def run\(cmd, timeout=60\):
    _, stdout, stderr = master.exec_command\(cmd, timeout=timeout\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    rc = stdout.channel.recv_exit_status\(\)
    return rc, out + err

# Wait and poll pod status
for i in range\(8\):
    time.sleep\(15\)
    rc, out = run\("kubectl get pods -n aiops -o wide"\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(f"--- {\(i+1\)*15}s ---\\n".encode\(\)\)
    sys.stdout.buffer.write\(out.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
    # Check if all running
    if "Running" in out and "ImagePullBackOff" not in out and "Pending" not in out and "ContainerCreating" not in out:
        sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"\\nAll pods Running!\\n"\)
        break

master.close\(\)
PYEOF)

Bash("D:/python3-12-9/python.exe" - <<'PYEOF'
import paramiko, sys

master = paramiko.SSHClient\(\)
master.set_missing_host_key_policy\(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy\(\)\)
master.connect\("192.168.9.221", username="root", password="Yangys@55", timeout=10\)

def run\(cmd, timeout=30\):
    _, stdout, stderr = master.exec_command\(cmd, timeout=timeout\)
    out = stdout.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    err = stderr.read\(\).decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)
    return out + err

r = run\("kubectl get svc -n aiops"\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"=== Services ===\\n" + r.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)

r = run\("kubectl get pods -n aiops"\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"\\n=== Pods ===\\n" + r.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)

# Test health endpoint
r = run\("curl -s http://localhost:8000/api/health 2>&1 || echo 'direct curl failed'"\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"\\n=== Backend health \(via cluster\) ===\\n" + r.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)

# Test via service
r = run\("curl -s http://$\(kubectl get svc backend -n aiops -o jsonpath='{.spec.clusterIP}'\):8000/api/health 2>&1 | head -c 300"\)
sys.stdout.buffer.write\(b"\\n=== Backend health \(via svc\) ===\\n" + r.encode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)

master.close\(\)
PYEOF)
